structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Temperature Control - Cooling Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output resets the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at the active setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature is greater than room temperature, the active setpoint is no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint based on cooling-loop output. Modulate cold duct damper to maintain measured cold duct airflow at the active setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature > room temperature, limit active setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Temperature Control - Deadband Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at that setpoint. The hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active cold duct airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Modulate cold duct damper to maintain measured cold duct airflow at the setpoint. Close hot duct damper.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Temperature Control - Heating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output is mapped to the hot duct damper position (pressure-dependent control). The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured discharge airflow at the minimum endpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map Heating Loop output to hot duct damper position. Modulate cold duct damper to maintain measured discharge airflow at minimum endpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature < room temperature, close hot duct damper.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the hot duct damper position. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured discharge airflow at the minimum endpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Maximum Hot Duct Airflow Limiting
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Maximum hot duct airflow is limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop whose setpoint is the heating maximum endpoint and whose output is the maximum hot duct damper position ranging from 0% to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Limit maximum hot duct airflow using a reverse-acting P-only loop with setpoint = Vheat-max. Output is maximum hot duct damper position (0-100%).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Maximum hot duct airflow shall be limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop whose setpoint is the heating maximum endpoint and whose output is the maximum hot duct damper position ranging from 0% to 100%.

evidence_quote: Maximum hot duct airflow shall be limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop whose setpoint is the heating maximum endpoint and whose output is the maximum hot duct damper position ranging from 0% to 100%.
evidence_text: Maximum hot duct airflow shall be limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop whose setpoint is the heating maximum endpoint and whose output is the maximum hot duct damper position ranging from 0% to 100%.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Override to Avoid Backflow
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Overriding Section 5.13.5.1 Logic (to Avoid Backflow from One Duct to the Other)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper is closed. If the cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating air handler not proven ON OR cooling air handler not proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Close heating damper if heating air handler not proven ON. Close cooling damper if cooling air handler not proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: 5.13.5.2.  Overriding Section 5.13.5.1  Logic  (to Avoid Backflow  from One Duct  to the Other )

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Low Airflow Alarm - Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Importance-Multiplier 0
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms are suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and the airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of max airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the damper position is 0% and the airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position = 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling max airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan proven ON

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, or Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify software switches exist to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Endpoints as Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active endpoints used in the control logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints for cooling maximum, minimum, and heating maximum vary by Zone Group mode as defined in Table 5.13.4.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.13.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
